2.label: Window Covering
2.description: Devices in this group, e.g. other curtains or blinds, will be controlled together with the connected motor.

paramInformation.label: S1: Send Scenes (Held Down and Released)
S2: Send Scenes (Held Down and Released)
Calibration
paramInformation.description: Set this parameter to 3 to start automatic calibration. A re-interview may be required after changing this parameter.

paramInformation.label: Operating Mode
paramInformation.description: A re-interview may be required after changing this parameter.

paramInformation.label: Delay for Power Detection After the Motor Start
paramInformation.description: Should be used when the engine slowly increases power consumption at start-up. Only modify when using electric curtains or low-power motors.

paramInformation.label: Motor Operation Detection
paramInformation.description: Power threshold interpreted as reaching the limit switch. Only modify when using electric curtains or low-power motors.

paramInformation.label: Up Movement Duration
paramInformation.description: Set automatically during calibration. Can be overridden if there are problems with automatic calibration.

paramInformation.label: Down Movement Duration
paramInformation.description: Set automatically during calibration. Can be overridden if there are problems with automatic calibration.

paramInformation.label: Shutter: Minimum Position
paramInformation.description: Used to prevent the shutter from fully closing, for example to protect a flowerpot on the windowsill.

metadata.inclusion:
1. Power the device.
2. Quickly press the PROG button or the S1 or S2 switch three times.
3. The LED indicator blinks yellow while the process is in progress, then turns green or magenta if successful, or red if not.
metadata.exclusion:
1. Make sure the device is powered.
2. Quickly press the PROG button or the S1 or S2 switch three times within 10 minutes of powering up the device.
3. The LED indicator turns red if unsuccessful.
metadata.reset:
1. Switch off the mains voltage.
2. Remove the device from the wall switch box.
3. Switch on the mains voltage.
4. Press and hold the PROG button to enter the menu.
5. Wait for the LED indicator to glow yellow.
6. Quickly release and click the PROG button again.
7. The LED indicator blinks yellow during the reset.
8. After a few seconds the device restarts, which is signaled by the red LED indicator.
